title: How to Play ZXSnake
seoTitle: How to Play ZXSnake | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand the ZXSnake objective, score structure, and game flow from launch to end-of-run decisions.

sections.heading: How to Play ZXSnake
paragraphs: Understand the ZXSnake objective, score structure, and game flow from launch to end-of-run decisions.

featureShowcases.heading: Start playing ZXSnake
featureShowcases.summary: Learn the core ZXSnake session flow: guide the snake, collect food, avoid collisions, and turn each run into a stronger score attempt.
body: This gives new players enough context to start a session confidently and understand what the game is measuring.
Use this page first, then move into controls, game modes, and strategy when you want to improve consistency.
bullets: Learn the flow from launch into active play.
Learn how controls, modes, and progress tracking.
Keeps beginner guidance practical and player-facing.

image.caption: ZXSnake how-to-play artwork shows the player flow into gameplay.

summary: ZXSnake starts with a clear arcade loop: guide the snake, collect food, avoid collisions, and turn each run into a stronger score attempt.
